creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
SynCE is a project for connecting to devices running Windows CE or Pocket PC.                       
SyncEngine talks the to a Windows Mobile device through the ActiveSync                              
protocol.

WWW: http://www.synce.org/moin/

Fix: This port also is a master port for upcoming
  deskutils/libopensync-plugin-synce and deskutils/libopensync-plugin-synce-devel
